name: Dazai Osamu | Dark Era | Soukoku
description:
(Chuuya POV)

"Keep the Demon Prodigy alive!"

Then Chuuya’s knife pressed firmly against Dazai’s throat.

Since Dazai, idiot that he is, managed to get himself kidnapped—whether on purpose or not—Chuuya had no choice but to drag him back.

Dazai POV VERSION Soukoku: (Linked)
